B/FLAM-80 Cremator

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search

Current patch: 1.006.300

Procurement
Unlock Cost
110 Medals
Source
Entrenched Division P3
“

Incendiary support fed by a massive fuel tank. This heavy flamethrower enables a continuous column of fire to cleanse the battlefield.

— Ship Management Terminal

The B/FLAM-80 Cremator is a Stratagem that calls down a Support Weapon consisting of a hose-fed, double barreled heavy flamethrower and fuel backpack. It can fire continuously without the need to reload.

Contents

  • 1 Procurement
  • 2 Stratagem Statistics
  • 3 Detailed Weapon Statistics
  • 4 Functionality
  • 5 Tactical Information
  • 6 Trivia
  • 7 Applicable Ship Modules
  • 8 Media
  • 9 Change History
  • 10 References

Procurement

The B/FLAM-80 Cremator is unlocked on the 3rd page of the Entrenched Division Premium Warbond for 110 Medals.

Stratagem Statistics

General
Call-in Time Standard 7.75 seconds
Upgraded 4.75 seconds
Uses Unlimited
Cooldown Standard 480 seconds
With Morale Augmentation 456 seconds

Functionality

  • The B/FLAM-80 Cremator boasts increased fire damage and an ammunition backpack with 500 units of fuel. As a backpack hose-fed weapon, it has the unique feature that it does not need to be manually reloaded like other backpack-reliant support weapons; however, it cannot be fired without its ammunition backpack equipped. When the B/FLAM-80 Cremator and its ammunition backpack are first picked up, it will play a roughly 1-second animation of the backpack rotating and the Helldiver inserting the fuel hose into the weapon. Unlike the M-1000 Maxigun, Helldivers can move freely while firing the B/FLAM-80 Cremator.

Tactical Information

  • The B/FLAM-80 Cremator is a more powerful FLAM-40 Flamethrower. It has increased range and coverage, deals more damage due to its double-barreled nature, and can fire for longer periods of time. However, it requires its associated backpack tank to operate and has less ammo overall than the FLAM-40.
    • The Cremator has roughly the range of 25 meters (measured in first person), which is 25% more than the FLAM-40 Flamethrower's 20 meter range.
  • Before firing, the pilot light must be ignited by holding the fire button. It may be fired instantly at any time while the pilot light is active.
    • The pilot light will extinguish automatically after a roughly 12-second period of disuse.
      • The pilot light will appear to visually extinguish roughly 2 seconds before it mechanically extinguishes.
    • The pilot light ignition process does not consume any ammo.
  • Firing at the floor will create a pool of fire that continues to burn for several seconds. This can set the Cremator user on fire too, so advancing whilst firing is not advised.
  • Diving directly backwards while shooting the Cremator will catch the Helldiver on fire, due to their legs passing in front of the jet.
  • B/FLAM-80 Cremator fire deals continuous damage throughout its travel. Skewering a target lengthwise can greatly increase the effect.
  • The B/FLAM-80 Cremator performs best on open ground. The flames are easily blocked by terrain or worse, deflected back towards you.

Trivia

  • The Cremator resembles the Imperial Guard version of the ubiquitous flamer from Warhammer 40,000, seen in this model of a Kasrkin. Both are fed from a backpack fuel tank connected by a hose, but the Cremator is double-barreled whereas the flamer has a single barrel.
  • The Cremator seems to be inspired by real life backpack fed flamethrowers, such as the American M2, M9, and M1 flamethrowers used during WWII and the Cold War. All of these designs feature two fuel tanks, but only a single barrel or nozzle.

Applicable Ship Modules

The following Ship Modules affect the B/FLAM-80 Cremator

Department Ship Module Effect
Patriotic
Administration
Center 		Streamlined Request Process Decreases Support Weapon stratagem cooldown by 10%.
Superior Packing Methodology Resupply stratagem boxes refill Support Weapons with the maximum number of carriable magazines.
Bridge Enhanced Combustion Fire damage from Stratagems increased by 25%.
Morale Augmentation Reduces cooldown time for all stratagems by 5%.
Engineering
Bay 		Streamlined Launch Process All Support Weapon stratagems launch immediately once called in, reducing overall deployment time.
